status_detail: BREAKTHROUGH on CORS+parser layer. Engine Phase3-B31 fix VERIFIED working: last header line no longer dropped, ACAO survives credentials-first ordering. Response headers count: 5 (vs v5's 4 missing-ACAO, vs v6's 0). All 5 headers visible IN ORDER: Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true, Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://gamma.app, Cache-Control, Content-Type, X-Content-Type-Options. NO CORS errors in console. /ai/v2/generation = 200 OK (h2). HOWEVER the warning DID NOT render -- new bug surface exposed: /ai/v2/render-generation = (failed) net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR + sibling render-generation 201 Created. EventStream tab opened (Chrome recognized text/event-stream) but ZERO events listed. Page shows empty outline panel with placeholder '1' card. Gamma's own internal error fired: '[PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request'. Bug has migrated downstream from headers/CORS to SSE body emit / HTTP/2 stream framing on the render-generation request.
request_status: /ai/v2/generation = 200 OK (h2); /ai/v2/render-generation = (failed) net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR + a separate render-generation 201 Created
eventstream_events_seen: no -- EventStream tab opened (Chrome recognized text/event-stream) but 0 events listed
frontend_error: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request
progress_vs_v5: better -- v5 had 4 headers (ACAO missing); v7 has all 5 with ACAO recovered, no CORS error
progress_vs_v6: better -- header set now complete and CORS layer fully passes (v6 had 0 headers)
breakthrough_status: ACAO present but UI broken -- Engine Phase3-B31 parser fix verified working, CORS handshake succeeds, but downstream SSE body delivery fails on render-generation
root_cause_hypothesis: Two distinct issues now isolated: (1) /ai/v2/generation returns 200 OK with valid headers but empty SSE body -- engine produces no DATA frames containing the warning event; (2) /ai/v2/render-generation hits ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR -- the sibling endpoint that gamma frontend invokes after generation is being intercepted incorrectly OR not at all, producing a malformed H2 frame. The render-generation 201 Created (succeeded) variant shows a working code path exists. The PII intercept may need to handle BOTH /ai/v2/generation AND /ai/v2/render-generation, or the warning needs to be delivered via render-generation specifically since that's where gamma reads from.
recommendation_for_dev: v8 priority A: investigate why /ai/v2/generation 200 OK has empty EventStream. Engine emits headers fine but no SSE event body -- likely event-formatter or write-flush issue.

v8 priority B: fix /ai/v2/render-generation ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Same HPACK encoder bug from #614 may be active here. Consider: does PII intercept apply to render-generation? If yes, check its template. If no, why is it failing now (was it working before)?
Capture engine-side log for #616 run: did engine intend to emit SSE 'warning' event on /ai/v2/generation? Did the response writer call flush()?
Side experiment: copy chatgpt's working PII flow exactly (it returns warning as non-SSE body via Content-Type text/event-stream — see #615) and see if gamma renders it.
errors_observed: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request
notes: Cycle 95 R-9 -- gamma v7 (=v5 reorder + Phase3-B31 engine fix) verify. PARTIAL with HUGE PROGRESS on header layer (CORS now fully passes, all 5 headers including ACAO present). Bug has migrated to SSE body / render-generation HTTP/2. Subagent 5m30s, slightly over 5min soft, well within 8min hard.
